fields.summary: The cited snippets are limited to site navigation: Anthropic's homepage lists product/initiative links including "Claude," "Claude's Constitution," "Responsible Scaling Policy," "AI Exponential Transparency," and a "Trust center" covering security and compliance, alongside learning resources (Anthropic Academy, Tutorials, Use cases). The Wikipedia source returned only page chrome with no article body. From this, only the surface signal that Anthropic publishes a large language model called Claude and centers its brand around AI policy, safety, and transparency can be grounded; a fuller description of the business is not disclosed in the cited sources.
